conclusion: mixed: subset difficulty shift, harness/provider constraints, and submitted-task convergence all contribute

difficulty_shift.selection_note: The 16 tasks were deliberately stratified by patch-size band and single/multi-file status; these are descriptive effects, not random-sample p-values.
